title: Senior Frontend Engineer (Vue.js)
description: Enterprise Connect builds HR and workforce management software used by 500 enterprise clients across Europe. Our frontend is built with Vue 3 and TypeScript. You'll join a team of 4 frontend engineers working on complex data-heavy interfaces — think scheduling grids, bulk data operations, and real-time dashboards.
responsibilities: Build complex scheduling and workforce management UI components
Optimise rendering performance for tables with 10k+ rows
Lead migration from Vue 2 (Options API) to Vue 3 (Composition API)
